businessSummary.oneLiner: World's largest EV maker and 'Physical AI Platform' company spanning autonomous driving, robotics, and energy storage
businessSummary.description: Tesla is transitioning from EV manufacturing to an integrated AI, robotics, and energy platform. FY2025 revenue $94.8B (-2.9% YoY), net income $3.8B (-46.5% YoY). Monday close $398.68 (+0.49%). Market awaiting NHTSA FSD safety review results after 3/9 final deadline. Austin robotaxi demand remains strong after fare increase to $3.25. Tokyo FSD Supervised demo continues. Market cap $1.57T, P/E 371.62x, Forward P/E 194.08x.
howTheyMakeMoney: Vehicle sales: ~73% of revenue ($69.5B). Model 3/Y core, Model S/X discontinuing Q2 2026
Energy business: ~14% of revenue ($12.8B, +27% YoY). Megapack/Powerwall growth
Services/Other: ~10% of revenue. Supercharger network, insurance, parts
FSD/Software: ~$3B in license revenue. Subscription conversion accelerating

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on EPS $1.08. Extreme premium reflecting autonomous driving/robotics optionality

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026E EPS $2.08. Still elevated but includes recovery expectations

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: FY2025 sharp decline. Price war + increased R&D spending

keyMetrics.name: Debt-to-Equity
keyMetrics.interpretation: Net cash position. Strong balance sheet

keyMetrics.name: Gross Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: All-time low due to price cuts

keyMetrics.name: ROE
keyMetrics.interpretation: Declined from 12.1% in FY2024 due to lower net income

growthDrivers.title: NHTSA FSD Safety Review Deadline (3/9) — Awaiting Results
growthDrivers.description: Final deadline for FSD safety data submission on 2.88M vehicles passed yesterday (3/9). Results will determine whether nationwide autonomous driving expansion accelerates or triggers massive recalls.

growthDrivers.title: Austin Robotaxi Fare Increase — Pricing Power Proven
growthDrivers.description: Base fare raised from $1 to $3.25 with demand remaining strong at 10-15 min wait times. Monetization trajectory signal.

growthDrivers.title: Tokyo FSD Supervised Demo — Japan Market Beachhead
growthDrivers.description: Public FSD demos continued throughout the weekend in Tokyo. In discussions with Japanese regulators. First step in international FSD expansion.

growthDrivers.title: European Recovery — France/Norway Market Share Rebound
growthDrivers.description: February market share recovery in France and Norway. Stabilization signal after two consecutive years of European sales decline.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 50%+ US EV market share leader, though overtaken globally by BYD. Vertical integration across software, manufacturing, energy, and 8.2B FSD miles is the core moat.

moats.description: 8.2 billion FSD miles. Overwhelming training data advantage over competitors.
In-house battery (4680), custom chips (HW4), software (FSD), charging infrastructure (Supercharger).
NACS is North America's EV charging standard. GM, Ford, Rivian all depend on Tesla Superchargers.

competitors.name: BYD
competitors.detail: 2025 global EV sales leader. Rapid European expansion, US limited by tariffs

competitors.name: Waymo (Alphabet)
competitors.detail: $16B funding, 400K+ weekly rides. Direct autonomous driving competitor

competitors.name: Rivian (RIVN)
competitors.detail: R2 SUV ($45,000) launching 2026, directly competing with Model Y

competitors.name: Xiaomi
competitors.detail: YU7 SUV outselling Model Y 2:1 in China pre-orders

recentNews.headline: NHTSA FSD safety review final deadline — 2.88M vehicles data submission
recentNews.significance: Final deadline after two extensions. Results will determine stock direction

recentNews.headline: Austin robotaxi base fare raised from $1 to $3.25
recentNews.significance: Excess demand driving price increase. Entering monetization trajectory

recentNews.headline: Jobs shock + oil past $90 triggers broad tech selloff
recentNews.significance: Nasdaq worst week. Macro headwinds persist

recentNews.headline: German gigafactory IG Metall works council election
recentNews.significance: Berlin plant labor cost increase risk

recentNews.headline: France/Norway February market share recovery
recentNews.significance: Stabilization after two years of European sales decline

analystOpinions.notableComment: Dan Ives (Wedbush) maintains $600, Gordon Johnson (GLJ) maintains $25. Extreme polarization. Morgan Stanley cut $425→$415.

risks.title: NHTSA FSD Review Uncertainty
risks.description: 3/9 deadline passed, awaiting results. 58 incidents, 14 Austin crashes. Recall or FSD restrictions could trigger 30% downside.

risks.title: Extreme Valuation
risks.description: P/E 371x, Forward P/E 194x. Hard to justify amid revenue contraction.

risks.title: Intensifying Global EV Competition
risks.description: BYD global #1, Xiaomi YU7, Rivian R2 launching. Market share defense burden.

risks.title: Macro Headwinds
risks.description: Iran war prolonging, oil $90+, jobs shock. Consumer sentiment deterioration risk.

risks.title: European Sales Weakness
risks.description: UK sales -37%, German labor disputes. European recovery delay risk.

buyReasons.title: Undisputed Autonomous Driving Leader
buyReasons.rationale: 8.2B FSD miles, Austin robotaxi commercialized, Tokyo international expansion. 2-3 years ahead of competitors.

buyReasons.title: Energy Business Explosive Growth
buyReasons.rationale: Megapack revenue +27% YoY. Energy storage market growing 30%+ annually.

buyReasons.title: FCF Improvement Momentum
buyReasons.rationale: $6.22B FCF (+73.7% YoY). Net cash position for financial stability.

buyReasons.title: Optimus Robot Option Value
buyReasons.rationale: Robot business potential not yet priced in. Limited production starting 2026.

overallOpinion: NHTSA FSD review final deadline (3/9) has passed. Range-bound $392-$412 expected until results are announced. Below both 50-day and 200-day SMAs indicating technical weakness, but RSI 42.85 is neutral, not oversold. NHTSA pass could trigger re-rating to $450+, failure could open downside to $340-$350. Analyst consensus suggests 0.6% downside, with extreme polarization (GLJ $25 vs Wedbush $600) reflecting uncertainty. Fundamental turnaround depends on FY2026E revenue +11% recovery, robotaxi monetization, and energy business acceleration.

threads.hook: Tesla's NHTSA judgment day has passed ⚡
threads.text:
FSD safety review deadline (3/9) done. $398.68 at close. Market holding its breath.

Pass → Nationwide autonomous driving → $450+
Fail → 2.88M vehicle recall → $340

Austin robotaxi still booming even after fare hike.

Which side of the bet are you on? 🤔

https://investory.kro.kr/stock/TSLA/analysis/2026-03-10

telegram.hook: Tesla's NHTSA judgment day has passed ⚡
telegram.text:
📊 TSLA $398.68 (+0.49%)

NHTSA FSD safety review final deadline (3/9) has passed. 2.88M vehicles under investigation, 58 incidents linked. Results will determine stock direction.

✅ Pass: Nationwide autonomous driving expansion → $450+ re-rating
❌ Fail: Massive recall/FSD restrictions → $340-$350 downside

Austin robotaxi demand remains strong with 10-15 min waits even after $3.25 base fare increase. Pricing power proven. Tokyo FSD demos continue.

Analysts extremely polarized: Wedbush $600 vs GLJ $25.
Forward P/E 194x — impossible to justify without autonomous driving.

The key question before results: Is FSD truly safe? 🤔

https://investory.kro.kr/stock/TSLA/analysis/2026-03-10
